privileged_info_summary: The task uses Nx Witness VMS, a synthetic video management system. Five cameras are configured with specific tag pairs: Parking Lot Camera (Outdoor, Vehicle), Loading Dock Camera (Outdoor, Logistics), Entrance Camera (Outdoor, Pedestrian), Server Room Camera (Indoor, Restricted), and Lobby Camera (Indoor, Public). Tags are stored in the userAttributes.deviceTags field. The outdoor_cameras list correctly identifies the three cameras tagged with the 'Outdoor' designation. A layout named 'Storm Watch' should contain only the outdoor-facing cameras. All metadata values are consistent and verified.
